title: Record abs140k, pblock20/10, and 5-line thinking glance

fixtureActions.content:
# Abs140 Pblock20 Thinking5 Contract

## Abs 140k
full compaction absolute soft trigger defaults to 140k tokens so long sessions reclaim earlier on large windows

## Pblock 20
parallel compaction block threshold defaults to 20k with a 10k target so large histories summarize in denser chunks

## Thinking 5
live thinking shows a 5-line tail glance so agent work stays transparent without expand

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/thinking vitest
